## clearRepetitionRuleDescriptor variable

Centralized descriptor for the `clear-repetition` command.

Drives the CLI subcommand `clear-repetition` and the MCP tool `task_clear_repetition`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
clearRepetitionRuleDescriptor: import("../registry/define.js").ResolvedCommandDescriptor<{
    taskId: string;
}, ClearRepetitionRuleResult, z.ZodObject<{
    taskId: z.ZodString;

}, {

}>>
```
